Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Everyone's okay with the special, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Okay, five specials, please![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Okay, four specials and one regular, please![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Sanada-san's NEVER treated us all to ramen before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'll accept that I lost, but why do I have to treat all of you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You're still goin' on about that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}C'mon, Sanada-san, a bet's a bet. Ya gotta pay up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}All right, all right! I never said I wouldn't.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}What's wrong, Aigis? You doubting me, too...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Have you seen the magazine on the counter? The headline caught my attention.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}"Emergence of a Messiah: The Charismatic One Speaks."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Oh, it must be about that doomsday cult. They're all over the Internet, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Hey, look at this photo! Check out their so-called "Messiah"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I thought something was up. So, it's Strega, after all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}"Mankind is currently imprisoned by the sins of hate and anger."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}"But soon, a savior will descend upon this world to break the chains that bind us, and lift us to new heights."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}"This great being is known as Nyx. I have beheld her glory, and she has blessed me with power beyond belief."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}"When Nyx arrives... there will be no more pain, no more suffering. Humanity shall be freed..."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}How the hell does he know about Nyx!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Wait, he's saying that Nyx will save the world!? But that's a lie![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I don't think that even matters. This is all just a game to him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}"But there are those who do not understand the truth even though they have also been granted her blessing."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}"They have acquired the same power as I, yet they abuse it for their own personal gain."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}"These miscreants are the ones to blame for the recent tragedies that have been plaguing our streets."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Wait, is he talking about us!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Shhh! Not so loud! We're not the only ones here, you know![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}R-Right, right, sorry... But can you blame me...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}And what do they mean by "the charismatic one"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Why's he suddenly a celebrity?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Well, apparently Jin was already pretty well-known on the Internet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}He's probably good at influencing public perception.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Yeah, I bet he orchestrated Takaya's rise to fame by building his brand like a celeb...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}"Brothers and sisters, I shall go forth to make preparations for Nyx's arrival..."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}"But do not fear those evildoers who desecrate their gifts. Nyx shall right their wrongs."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}"May your hearts be filled with peace as you await your salvation."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}"Blessed are those who take joy in the coming of Nyx."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}"The revolution is upon us, my brethren!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}"Revolution"? People can't seriously be buying this crap, can they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}"Perhaps the power of an exceptionally charismatic individual is the only way to change this nebulous future..."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}It appears Strega disappeared again after the interview.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}Well, there's only one place they could've gone—Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}Hmph... They're just wasting everyone's time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Still, it seems they've managed to shift the atmosphere of the entire city.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Even if they don't say it out loud, people must be scared inside...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Why else would anyone believe this nonsense? It's not normal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}Believing what you hear is a choice. There's no real way for them to know what's true.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Well, no wonder it feels like the world's ending... We're all gonna die.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}All life will eventually come to an end. Does Nyx's involvement change that in some way?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}Death is a natural occurrence in the cycle of life. Don't all humans realize this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}To tell you the truth, I never even woulda thought about my own death if none of this happened.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}But we're already here, so why don't we just leave it at that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 9 25 25}Our target is Nyx. If Strega gets in our way, we'll deal with them, too. That's all there is to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}We'll probably run into them in Tartarus, anyway...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}No matter how you look at it, they want us out of the picture.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}The Promised Day's almost here, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}We need to do all we can until then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}Alright... Then first things first, we're gonna need lots of energy! Let's eat![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 77 0 0}Excuse me! I'll add a Hagakure Bowl to the list![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 78 0 0}You don't mind, right, Sanada-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 79 0 0}Whoa, Junpei, didn't you say you were eating half of Aigis's food too?[n]{f 1 1}
